バトルアリーナは、「共通シップ」でのみプレイできます。
以下のいずれかの方法で、共通シップに移動してください。

・クエストカウンターのトップメニューから
　「バトルアリーナをプレイする」を選択

・ブロック転送テレポーターから
　「共通シップのバトルロビーへ移動」を選択

・クイックメニューから「共通シップへ行く」を選択

【共通シップとは？】
　異なるシップに所属するプレイヤーと一緒に、
　バトルアリーナやチャレンジクエストを
　プレイできる専用のシップです。

What is the Universal Ship?
It is a dedicated ship that allows you to participate in
Challenge Quests or play in the Battle Arena with players
in different blocks.

クエストを開始時に、
「エクストリームパス」を消費します。

「エクストリームパス」は管理官プリンから
アカウントにつき、２２時間ごとに
受け取ることができます。

一部Ｅトライアルの中には、発生中
コスモアトマイザーを含む全回復効果が
一律で低下するものがあります。
ただし、復活時の回復効果は低下しません。

PHANTASY STAR ONLINE2 の世界の
謎に迫る物語のエピソード1を
体験するクエストです。

日常的に各地を回り、情報を集めていると
それらの情報を元に、新たな道を発見し
新事実や真相に近づいていきます。

あなたの歴史への介入のため
あなた一人で挑むクエストとなります。

ある特定の条件が課され
それを達成することで報酬が発生する
クエストです。

クエストにより条件の種類は多岐にわたり
報酬の内容も変化します。

特定の期間のみ公開される
期間限定のクエストです。

期間が過ぎると受注出来なくなります。

PHANTASY STAR ONLINE2 の世界の
謎に迫る物語のエピソード2を
体験するクエストです。

日常的に各地を回り、情報を集めていると
それらの情報を元に、新たな道を発見し
新事実や真相に近づいていきます。

観測と異なる歴史を創り出し
さらなる未来へ繋ぐため
あなた一人で挑むクエストとなります。

大会やイベント用に、
公式ネットカフェの中でも特定店舗限定で
公開されているクエストです。

参加者が「アドバンスカプセル」を
特定数所持している必要があります。

クエストクリア時に
「アドバンスリスク」が上昇します。
パーティーリーダーの
「アドバンスリスク」の数値に応じて
クエストの難易度が変化します。

「アドバンスリスク」は、クエストごとに
累積計算されており、一定期間で
数値がリセットされます。

自由にフィールドを散策します。
クエストポイントの達成または、
最深部でボスエネミーを討伐すると
クエストクリアとなります。

プレイヤー同士でクリア時間を
競うためのクエストです。

ルートや条件などが画一化されており
同じ条件で競い合うことが可能です。

タイムアタックの記録でランキングが
行われている場合は、他プレイヤーとの
記録の比較を行うことが可能です。

緊急任務として突発的に発生する
受注期間が限定されたクエストです。

市街地に対する襲撃への応戦や

prepared before accepting them.

cooperation with other players are very important.

Challenge Quests can only be accepted from the
Universal Ship or the Challenge Block.
Please travel there from the Block Transfer Teleporter.

What is the Universal Ship?
It is a dedicated ship that allows you to participate
in Challenge Quests or play in the Battle Arena with
players in different blocks.
Note: Friend Lists, Mail, and Symbol Art will be
switched over to Universal Ship use only.
What is a Challenge Block?
It is a block where you can accept Challenge Quests.
You can accept the same quests that you would on
the Universal Ship.

The ARKS GP 2016 Preliminaries are underway. This
ARKS GP quest can be accepted from the Universal
Ship or the Challenge Block. Please travel there
from the Block Transfer Teleporter.

In the ARKS GP 2016 Preliminaries, you can choose
to play using various class equipment and class skill
sets for classes like Hunter or Ranger by going to
the Class Terminal in the Gateway Ship.

A quest found only in the Net Café is underway.
It can only be accepted from the Universal Ship
or the Challenge Block. Please travel there from
the Block Transfer Teleporter.

Universal Ship
This ship allows you to play through quests with
players in different blocks.
Note: The data for Friend Lists, Mail, and Symbol
Art will be witched over to Universal Ship use only.

Challenge Block
This is a block where you can accept specific quests.
You can accept the same quests that you would on
the Universal Ship.

You can only play in the Battle Arena when on the Universal
Ship. Please use one of the methods below to travel to the
Universal Ship.

- [Play in Battle Arena] from the Top Menu at the Quest
Counter

- [Universal Ship Battle Lobby] from the Block Transfer
Teleporter

- [Go to Universal Ship] from the Quick Menu

What is the Universal Ship?
It is a dedicated ship that allows you to participate in
Challenge Quests or play in the Battle Arena with players
in different blocks.

Buster Quests are unlocked after you clear A World in
Disarray in Main Quests [Ep. 5].

Note: If you have already unlocked Buster Quests with another
character in the same account, transitioning to Ep. 5 mode will
allow you to accept these quests.

These quests let you experience Episode 3 in the
story of PHANTASY STAR ONLINE 2's
mysterious world.

As you trek through various locales and gather
information, you'll discover new paths and inch ever
closer to new revelations.

You alone will shape your own history.

These are quests picked out each day from the list
of Expedition and ARKS quests.

Recommended Quests are available to all players,
even if they do not meet the requirements for
them.

In these quests, you set off to investigate fields
where abnormal readings have been observed.

Because these quests are extremely difficult, you
need to meet certain conditions to accept them.

These are ARKS GP quests that can be accepted
from the Challenge Block during a set time period.
Once time is up, you can no longer accept these
quests. You can earn Challenge Miles by clearing
these quests.

[Note]
Please see the Player's Site for information on
ARKS GP regulations and how to enter.

These solo-only quests give more EXP, meseta, and
rare item drops than other quests.


When you start a quest, Bonus Keys will be
consumed based on the rank specified.

Clearing some Recommended Quests at A Rank or
better will occasionally reward you with a
Bonus Key.

These quests let you experience Episode 4 in the
story of PHANTASY STAR ONLINE 2's
mysterious world.

Welcome to the ARKS Training Facility!

Here, you can practice the basic fighting moves of
PSO2 in actual combat.
First, give Standard Training a try!

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Hunter class in actual combat.

The Hunter class is skilled in short-range attacks
using Melee Weapons like Swords and Partisans.

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Ranger class in actual combat.

The Ranger class is skilled in long-range attacks
using Ranged Weapons like Assault Rifles.

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Force class in actual combat.

The Force class is skilled in long-range attacks
using Techniques that resemble magic.

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Fighter class in actual combat.

The Fighter class is skilled in short-range attacks
using Melee Weapons like Knuckles and Twin
Daggers.
Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Gunner class in actual combat.

The Gunner class is skilled in short to mid-range
attacks using Ranged Weapons like Twin Machine
Guns.
Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Techter class in actual combat.

The Techter class is skilled in using Wands for
direct attacks or Technique attacks, as well as
providing support.
Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Braver class in actual combat.

The Braver class is skilled in short and long-range
attacks using weapons like Katanas and Bows.

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Bouncer class in actual combat.

The Bouncer class is skilled in tricky attacks like
Soaring Blades and using Jet Boots or Techniques.

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Summoner class in actual combat.

The Summoner class raises pets and instructs them
in battle with a Harmonizer. Raising pets is
important for this class.
Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

You will now be able to accept quests that
you usually cannot, such as Urgent Quests that
have not spontaneously occurred.

A Trigger Item will be consumed based on the
quest set when you accepted.

If a player who consumed a Trigger Item
abandons the quest, everyone in the same
room will abandon it as well.

The goal of these quests is to achieve as high a
score as possible within the time limit.

The quest is updated every day, and each one
offers a different gimmick or locale.

High scores are calculated based on the quest
and difficulty level.

These are ARKS GP quests for competitions or
events and are available only in certain shops.
Clearing these quests earns you Challenge Miles.

The Battle Arena is a training facility where you can
test your fighting skills against other ARKS
members.

Level, equipment, and items are set specifically for
the Battle Arena.

Battle Coins, which you can only earn by competing,
can be used to purchase all kinds of items. Winning
will also raise your Battle Ranking and earn you
extravagant rewards.

These quests let you experience Episode 5 in the
story of PHANTASY STAR ONLINE 2's
mysterious world.

These quests let you experience a compilation
of past episodes in the story of PHANTASY
STAR ONLINE 2's mysterious world.

The goal of these quests is to lower the Forces
Gauge to destroy the enemy forces.

The Buster Points saved in each account are used to
automatically match players. In a Main Match or a
Main Match: Advanced, Buster Points change
depending on whether you win or lose.

Additionally, winning a Free Match allows you to
recover twice with a Main Match Boost.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Hero class in actual combat.

The Hero is a Scion Class that adapts to any
situation, using three types of weapons: melee,
ranged, and magic.
Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

A selection of campaigns and ARKS Boost Rallies
that are available for a limited time.
Clearing all eligible quests and campaigns with
special content will allow you to accept ARKS Boost
Rallies with boosts applied.

Note: ABR-eligible quests are the only way you can
earn boosts for ARKS Boost Rallies.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Dark Blast class in actual combat.

The Dark Blast class is able to harness the
incredible power of Dark Falz in battle.

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Training quests in virtual reality (VR) where you try
to achieve a high score within the time limit.

The details of the mission change based on the
difficulty level, and every time you accept one of
these quests the links between missions change as
well. That means that you need to be adaptable.

High scores are calculated based on the quest,
difficulty level, and conditions.

(Provisional) These quests let you experience
Episode 6 in the story of PHANTASY STAR
ONLINE 2's mysterious world.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Phantom class in actual combat.

The Phantom is a Scion Class skilled in everything
from combo attacks to support using three types of
weapons: melee, ranged, and magic.
Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Urgent Quests are occasional events featuring
attractive rewards like rare items.

That said, you might find these quests difficult if
you are just starting out.

To get more familiar with the game, first clear the
expedition Forest Exploration and get your
equipment in order.

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
AIS Vega in actual combat.

The highly mobile AIS Vega has new skills
developed for space skirmishes.

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access Storage.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back to a different block.

A virtual reality (VR) training quest for
calculating how much damage you can deal
with your current equipment and skills.

Try out different equipment and skill
combinations as you raise your class level
to see just how damaging you can be!

Practice the basic fighting moves and skills of the
Étoile class in actual combat.

The Étoile is a Scion Class that deals in
melee attacks and ally-support skills.

Note: In Practice Quests, there are prescribed
settings for your character's strength and equipment.
Additionally, you cannot access the Storehouse.

After completing this quest, you may be sent back
to a different block.

Quests to be cleared in 5 stages.
Keep an eye on your party's Life Points
while earning Divide Points.

Keep the party's situation in mind
and decide at the end of each stage whether to
continue down the Life Point healing route
or the Divide Point earning route.

The more Divide Points you earn, the better
the rewards gained. Earning enough Divide Points
in a week will unlock additional rewards.
